summary: Fabric v2.0 rc.3: review/promote half of the knowledge cycle — fab_review MCP tool (6 actions: list/approve/reject/modify/search/defer with late-bind id allocation, layer-flip via id reallocation, 2-phase events), fabric-review Skill template with mode inference, archive-hint.cjs second signal (pending overflow → review skill), doctor filesystem-edit fallback, install pipeline + integration tests + dogfood + batched-end gate. Schemas pre-locked at api-contracts.ts:332-440 (zero degrees of freedom). 9 atomic tasks, single-script hook (extends not forks), batched Gemini review at end per user MEMORY.md. Final deliverable: local annotated tag v2.0.0-rc.3 (no push).
approach: Two parallel-safe groups land first (TASK-001 server core + TASK-003 skill template + TASK-004 hook extension + TASK-005 doctor extension are independent; can be authored concurrently). TASK-002 layers reject/modify/search/defer onto TASK-001 (sequential dep). TASK-006 wires installer for TASK-003 skill (depends on TASK-003). TASK-007 integration tests need TASK-001+002+005 service surfaces. TASK-008 dogfood needs TASK-001+002+005+006 deployed (real install + service flow). TASK-009 final gate batches Gemini review + coverage gate + tag (depends on all 8). Each task = 1 atomic conventional commit on main. Service uses execFileSync git mv (existing precedent at packages/cli/src/scanner/forensic.ts:414, packages/server/src/services/rehydrate-state.ts:1) — no new dep. Layer-flip is the only legal stable_id mutation (allocates new id under target layer, git mvs across layer roots, emits knowledge_layer_changed). Filesystem-edit fallback uses reason-prefix '[synthesized]' to avoid envelope schema bump.
estimated_time: 12-16 hours total: TASK-001 (2.5h, server core+tests), TASK-002 (2h, 4 actions+tests), TASK-003 (1.5h, prose), TASK-004 (1h, hook ext+tests), TASK-005 (1h, doctor check+tests), TASK-006 (1h, install wiring), TASK-007 (1.5h, integration tests), TASK-008 (1h, dogfood execution), TASK-009 (1.5-2h, batched gate)

design_decisions.decision: Single fab_review MCP tool with discriminated-union switch over 6 actions
design_decisions.rationale: Cursor 40-tool cap forces consolidation; schemas already pre-locked as discriminated union
design_decisions.tradeoff: review.ts grows to 300-400 LOC; mitigated by TASK-001/002 split keeping each PR reviewable

design_decisions.decision: execFileSync('git', ['mv', from, to]) for approve+layer-flip (no simple-git dep)
design_decisions.rationale: Existing repo precedent (forensic.ts:414, rehydrate-state.ts:1); no new dep; sync fits service flow; failures throw → emit promote_failed
design_decisions.tradeoff: Tests need real git init in tmpdir (~30-60ms per test) instead of mocking — accepted for higher fidelity

design_decisions.decision: Layer-flip = drop old id + allocate NEW id under new layer + git mv across layer roots (counter-monotonic)
design_decisions.rationale: Q-review locked decision; KnowledgeIdAllocator counters are per-(layer,type) so id-prefix-swap would break counter independence; layer_changed event has from_layer/to_layer for forensic replay
design_decisions.tradeoff: Old stable_id is permanently retired (counters monotonic); existing references in events.jsonl still resolve via prior_stable_id link in modify response

design_decisions.decision: Single archive-hint.cjs handles both archive and review signals via signal field in stdout JSON (not forking review-hint.cjs)
design_decisions.rationale: User KT-D entry on disk argues for single-script DRY; one template install; one threshold-config block; precedence: archive > review
design_decisions.tradeoff: decide() now has 4 branch outcomes (archive-only, review-only, both→archive-wins, none→null); mitigated by inline comments + 4-outcome test coverage

design_decisions.decision: Filesystem-edit fallback uses reason='[synthesized] filesystem-edit-fallback' (string prefix) instead of adding boolean field to schema
design_decisions.rationale: Avoids shared-schema bump and migration; reason field is free-text; grep-able for forensic queries; constant SYNTHESIZED_PROMOTED_REASON imported from shared
design_decisions.tradeoff: String-prefix conventions risk drift over rc cycles; mitigated by exporting the constant from a single shared module

design_decisions.decision: Mode inference inside SKILL.md prose (not server-side); AskUserQuestion locked to genuine choices only
design_decisions.rationale: Q-review locked decision; per Boundary B, semantic checks delegate to LLM; system DOES NOT ask user for mode (algorithm: scan recent user message → events.jsonl tail → pending count → infer)
design_decisions.tradeoff: Prose-as-program limits machine-checkability; mitigated by grep-verifiable section headers in TASK-003 convergence criteria

design_decisions.decision: Batched Gemini review at end (TASK-009), not per-task
design_decisions.rationale: Explicit user MEMORY.md preference (feedback_review_batching.md): for multi-task lite-plan chains, run Gemini review + coverage ONCE at end
design_decisions.tradeoff: End-of-cycle gate cannot catch per-task drift early; mitigated by per-task vitest test runs (per-task convergence) and coverage gate ALLOWLIST scoped to net-new files

design_decisions.decision: rc.3 reject preserves file on disk (no auto-deletion)
design_decisions.rationale: Audit history preservation; rc.4 doctor will own retention/cleanup policy
design_decisions.tradeoff: Pending tree slowly accumulates rejected entries; rc.4 ships vacuum

data_flow.diagram: Skill (fabric-review SKILL.md) → mode inference → fab_review MCP tool (action) → tools/review.ts handler → services/review.ts dispatcher → [list reads pending + canonical | approve allocates id + git mv + 2-phase events | reject emits event | modify in-place OR layer-flip with id reallocation + git mv + layer_changed event | search filters in-memory | defer emits event] → events.jsonl ledger → (downstream) archive-hint.cjs reads ledger + scans pending → emits review/archive signal on Stop hook → doctor synthesizes promoted event for filesystem-edit orphans

stages.input: user message + project state (pending count + recent events)

transformations: allocate new id under new layer
scan canonical/, parse stable_id from filename
synthesize event with reason='[synthesized] filesystem-edit-fallback' on doctor --fix

stages.output: stdout JSON {decision, reason, signal:'archive'|'review'} or null
transformations: trigger evaluation (count>=10 OR oldest>=7d for review; count>=5 OR 24h for archive)

dependencies: @fenglimg/fabric-shared (FabReviewInputSchema, FabReviewOutputSchema, fabReviewAnnotations, knowledge_* event schemas — all pre-locked, zero new schema work)

execution_mode.code_review_tool: Gemini Review (batched at end per user MEMORY.md feedback_review_batching)
execution_mode.convergence_review_tool: Agent (Claude Code writes tests + per-file >=90% gate)
execution_mode.commit_style: conventional commits, 1 atomic commit per task

dimensions.completeness: PASS — all 12 handoff acceptance criteria mapped to tasks; 9 target_files covered
dimensions.granularity: PASS — 9 tasks, 1-2.5h each; T1+T2 split keeps single review.ts file's PRs reviewable
dimensions.dependencies: PASS — DAG validated (no cycles); parallel groups: {T1,T3,T4,T5}→{T2,T6}→T7→T8→T9
dimensions.convergence_criteria: PASS — all quantified (coverage %, event counts, stable_id regex, exit codes)
dimensions.constraint_compliance: PASS — pre-locked schemas honored, atomic writes used, single-script hook matches user KT-D, batched review at end per MEMORY, no push, conventional commits
